use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dialogs
Navigation triggers between pages or views
Destructive action confirmations with destructive variant
Icon-only actions in toolbars or headers
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Uses standard Tailwind CSS classes for styling with focus-visible accessibility rings. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for any web application interface.
